items.title: Deep Learning for Crop Disease Detection
items.summary: CNN-based crop disease detection using leaf images in controlled environments.
items.known_gap: Limited real-field dataset and no regional language UX.

items.title: Smart Parking Slot Detection
items.summary: Computer vision system that detects parking slot occupancy from CCTV feeds.
items.known_gap: Cloud-only deployment and weak edge optimization.

items.title: Voice Assistant for Farmers
items.summary: Voice-based agri helper with weather and fertilizer recommendations.
items.known_gap: English dominant and no offline inference path.

items.title: Rural Telemedicine Triage Bot
items.summary: Chatbot for preliminary symptom triage and referral guidance.

items.title: Offline Classroom Learning Assistant
items.summary: AI tutor for low-connectivity classrooms using on-device models.
items.known_gap: Limited analytics and teacher dashboard insights.

items.title: Waste Segregation Using Edge Vision
items.summary: Edge AI for classifying dry/wet waste at source.
items.known_gap: Small dataset and low precision on mixed waste streams.
